purpose: Reference HTML web PPT design system for editorial-magazine and Swiss-style horizontal decks, screenshot handling, image-slot discipline, and browser-based presentation QA.
style: single-file HTML deck, editorial magazine, Swiss International Style, screenshot backgrounds, strict layout rhythm
disabled_when: formal client deliverable requires permissive assets
copying AGPL templates or scripts into NERO production
exact financial tables or regulatory wording would be embedded in generated images
notes: AGPL-3.0 upstream. Use as restricted design reference and NERO-native rule source only; do not clone or copy full templates/assets by default.
readme_summary: Guizang PPT Skill is a web PPT skill for Claude Code/Codex agent environments. It creates single-file HTML horizontal slide decks, PPT visuals, and cover-style assets. It includes two visual systems: Style A, editorial magazine x e-ink, for narrative, views, sharing, and personal expression; Style B, Swiss International Style, for facts, products, analysis, and methodology. The repository emphasizes theme presets, strict layout rhythm, screenshot handling, image-slot planning, optional GPT-Image/GPT-M visual generation, browser review, and Swiss-style validation.
key_patterns: image slot binding before visual generation
